name: plugin-grupo-gestao
description: Pacote de skills, comandos e hooks para facilitar e automatizar os workflows de desenvolvimento do Grupo Gestão
author: COPS 1.2026

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Create a new project with GG standards — guided end-to-end for non-technical users

commands.name: spec
commands.description: Spec-driven development workflow: spec → implement → test

commands.name: test
commands.description: Run tests, analyze failures, and fix them

commands.name: ship
commands.description: Conventional commit + optional PR with GG template
